## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or log output.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Docker version: [e.g. 24.0]
- GPU: [e.g. AMD MI300X, NVIDIA RTX 4090, none]
- Branch/commit: [e.g. main @ abc1234]
